title: arctostaphylos nummularia
intro: Arctostaphylos nummularia, also known as the nummulared bearberry or green bearberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos nummularia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even help manage blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of the plant are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
